caption: In the video, a woman is seated in front of a backdrop featuring the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle," set against a lush jungle scene. She is wearing a black shirt with a zebra print pattern and has long dark hair. The woman appears to be engaged in an interview or discussion, as she gestures with her hands while speaking. In the first image, she is holding a tablet and pointing towards it, possibly referencing something on the screen. In the second image, she is seen touching her neck with one hand, perhaps emphasizing a point or expressing a thought. The setting suggests a promotional event or press conference for the movie.
